name: Home Assistant Automation Generator
description: Generates valid Home Assistant automation YAML from natural language. Uses the live entity snapshot to reference real entity IDs. Output is always copyable YAML ready to paste into HA — no write access required.
trigger: Invoke when the user asks to create, build, write, or generate a Home Assistant automation, scene, script, or schedule. Also invoke when the user asks to fix or improve existing HA YAML.
